greeting: Few earn the right to bear this title.
Let us see if you belong among legends.
blunder: The kingdom knighted me for valor. They'd knight you for accidental entertainment.
I searched for your strategy. After careful investigation, I've declared it missing.
Somewhere, a court jester just got promoted after witnessing that move.
check: Check. Legends are not built on moves like yours.
promotion: A new queen. Pity she arrived to witness this position.
default: I was knighted before the Monarch himself.
It was the proudest day of my life.
Yet the title changed less than I expected.
I still saw the same soldier in the mirror.
victory: A title must be earned. You are not ready for this one.
A decorative suit of armor would've put up a stronger defense.
